name: Get Asset
description: Reads asset metadata from any resolvable address. The 'id' argument accepts a hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or any workspace path. Hash-form refs read from the content-addressed store; other forms walk the universal lattice resolver and return the value if it is a map. Returns the metadata as 'value', consistent with covia:read. Use asset:content to retrieve the binary content payload separately. Returns exists: false if the source is not found or the resolved value is not asset-shaped.

id.description: Asset reference. Any resolvable address: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).

exists.description: True if a metadata map was found at the address

value.description: The resolved metadata object (present when exists is true)
